span.p:
Top-5 load-bearing claims, prototyped + tested against
REAL telemetry + fresh microbenchmarks (2026-06-16/17),
each adversarially verified

big numbers priced fused side at a
5ns floor the real hook never hits

MEASURED HIGHER 239:1
(median session 382:1)
strengthens 'tool time = ingest time'

span.p:
NET: the qualitative direction of all 5 held —
but 4 of 5 headline MAGNITUDES were overstated,
and I:O was understated. 0/29 claims scored NOVEL:
the IP is the ASSEMBLY of known parts.
